key.name: target-bus
key.summary: I²C bus of the selected monitor
key.description: Bus number (e.g. "7") of the monitor to control. Empty means use the first detected monitor.

key.name: detected-monitors
key.description: Written by the extension after each ddcutil detect, read by the preferences dialog.

key.name: rescan-trigger
key.description: Preferences bump this counter to ask the extension to re-scan monitors.

key.name: show-hdmi
key.summary: Show HDMI (0x11) in the tile menu

key.name: show-dp
key.summary: Show DisplayPort (0x0f) in the tile menu

key.name: show-usbc
key.summary: Show USB-C (0x1b) in the tile menu
